# deny_domains.txt — base deny feed, loaded by ALL sectors
# One fnmatch pattern per line. Blank lines and # comments are ignored.
# Sector-specific entries belong in the relevant extra feed file
# (e.g. healthcare_threats.txt).
# -------------------------------------------------------------------------

# [SME-DEMO] Phishing — credential harvesting landing pages
login-paypal-secure-verify.com
*.secure-account-verify.net

# [SME-DEMO] Ransomware C2 + YARA trigger
# "Locky" in hostname fires SmeRansomware YARA rule (+35)
# dns_denied(40) + yara(35) = score 75 — MONITOR from office (threshold 80)
Locky.decrypt-files.net
*.decrypt-files.net

# [SME-DEMO] Cryptominer C2 — triggers SmeCryptoMiner YARA rule
# dns_denied(40) + yara(35) = score 75 — MONITOR from office
xmrig-pool.crypto-mine.io
*.crypto-mine.io

# [SME-DEMO] Generic C2 / data collection staging
c2-data-collect.net

# [SME-DEMO] Guest network burst target
# dns_denied(40) >= guest block_threshold(40) -> immediate BLOCK
ads-malware-tracker.net

# [LEGAL-DEMO] Legal sector threat domains
# clio-encrypt.c2-server.ru   — YARA LegalRansomwareC2 (+35) + dns_denied(40) = 75 → BLOCK
# tor-exit-relay.onion-gw.net — YARA LegalTorExitRelay (+35) + dns_denied(40) = 75 → BLOCK
# opposing-counsel.harvest.io — YARA LegalPrivilegeViolation (+35) + dns_denied(40) = 75 → BLOCK
# wetransfer-legal.io         — feed-only dns_denied(40) = 40 → MONITOR (no YARA match)
clio-encrypt.c2-server.ru
tor-exit-relay.onion-gw.net
opposing-counsel.harvest.io
wetransfer-legal.io

# [GOV-DEMO] Government sector threat domains
# apt28-c2.sovereign-exfil.ru  — feed(+40) + YARA GovAptC2(+35) = 75 → BLOCK (classified block=70)
# gov-login-verify.com         — feed-only(+40) → MONITOR (internal monitor=45)
# tor-state-relay.onion-gw.net — feed(+40) + YARA GovTorRelay(+35) = 75 → BLOCK (guest block=65)
# govdocs-leak.onion.to        — feed-only(+40) → MONITOR / BLOCK depending on segment
apt28-c2.sovereign-exfil.ru
gov-login-verify.com
tor-state-relay.onion-gw.net
govdocs-leak.onion.to
